body.text: Worked: • Read all three seeded files: repo/qa/scenarios/index.yaml, repo/extensions/qa-lab/src/suite.ts, and repo/docs/help/testing.md. • Extra QA scenario candidates: config restart capability flip and image generation roundtrip. Failed: • None observed in mock mode. Blocked: • No live provider evidence in this lane. Follow-up: • Re-run with a real model for qualitative coverage.
Protocol note: model switch handoff confirmed on gpt-5.5-alt. QA mission from QA_KICKOFF_TASK.md still applies: understand this OpenClaw repo from source + docs before acting.

Pending: maintainer feedback before publishing
Blocked: publishing needs explicit user approval
Done: local evidence captured in personal-task-status.txt
